gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no blocking findings; compatibility aliases and raw array/object target formats remain preserved.
verification: python -m pytest tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py; python -m pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py::test_repository_directories_have_readme_or_package_docstring; python -m pytest -q; poetry check && poetry install --dry-run && poetry install --dry-run --extras databricks --extras test && poetry build; git diff --check; GPT-5.5 review approved with no blocking findings
what_changed: Databricks engine-probe target files now reject unsupported top-level target keys and unsupported per-probe keys while preserving documented legacy aliases.
why: Keeps generated native-probe target handoffs fail-closed before Databricks run-submit payloads are produced, improving release provenance for vLLM/SGLang probe jobs.
